title: rubus × thamnophilus
intro: Rubus × thamnophilus is a hybrid species of raspberry, specifically a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × thamnophilus lie in its high antioxidant content, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × thamnophilus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
